testcase.name: generateTokens(userId) > should generate tokens with {userId} as string
generateTokens(userId) > should generate tokens with null {userId}
generateTokens(userId) > should generate tokens with undefined {userId}
generateTokens(userId) > should generate tokens with empty string {userId}
generateTokens(userId) > should generate tokens with numeric {userId}
generateTokens(userId) > should throw error when ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET is missing
generateTokens(userId) > should throw error when REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET is missing
generateTokens(userId) > should throw error when ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET is empty
generateTokens(userId) > should throw error when REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET is empty
generateTokens(userId) > should generate unique tokens on each call
generateTokens(userId) > should include standard JWT claims
generateTokens(userId) > should generate tokens in valid JWT format
generateTokens(userId) > should not decode access token with refresh secret
generateTokens(userId) > should not decode refresh token with access secret
generateTokens(userId) > should handle jwt.sign errors gracefully
